message:
refactor(router): consolidate route creation to Route::new in macros

Simplify route construction by having the macro call Route::new()
directly instead of Route::with_placeholder_handler(). The latter is
retained as a documented compatibility alias for older macro expansions
and tests.

route.rs (macros):
- Replace Route::with_placeholder_handler() call with Route::new()

trie.rs (router):
- Update with_placeholder_handler() docs: clarify it is an alias for
  Route::new kept for compatibility, not a compile-time discovery hook
- Note that a Route never contains an actual handler function

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -743,7 +743,7 @@ pub fn route_impl(method: &str, attr: TokenStream, item: TokenStream) -> TokenSt
         #[doc(hidden)]
         #[allow(non_snake_case)]
         pub fn #route_fn_name() -> fastapi_router::Route {
-            fastapi_router::Route::with_placeholder_handler(
+            fastapi_router::Route::new(
                 fastapi_core::Method::#method_ident,
                 #path_str,
             )
